profile.name: hyperframes

intro.desc: HyperFrames is an open-source framework for turning HTML, CSS, media, and seekable animations into deterministic MP4 videos. Use it locally with the CLI, from AI coding agents with skills, or as the rendering core behind hosted authoring workflows.

features: Product launch videos and feature announcements
PR walkthroughs with animated code diffs, narration, and captions
Data visualizations, chart races, and map animations
Social videos with kinetic captions, overlays, and music
Reusable motion graphics for automated content pipelines
